Drawn well and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 12 at this track December 4 over 2000m, 9 len behind Al Fahidi carrying 57kg at $7.70. form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 29-day let-up.
